Agent Isolation

Security by design, not afterthought

Every agent runs in an isolated container with strict role-based access control. They cannot exceed their boundaries—even if they try.

Database Protection

Agents operate in sandboxed containers with strict RBAC. Read-only access prevents accidental deletions or modifications.

Cannot execute DROP commands
Cannot delete production records
Query market analysis data

Communication Guards

Draft-only mode for emails and messages. Bulk sends require explicit human approval. All outbound communication is logged and auditable.

Send to >100 recipients
Access external addresses outside CRM
Draft campaign email

Instruction Firewall

Agents cannot instruct employees to perform tasks outside predefined workflows. Prevents social engineering.

Request employee credentials
Bypass approval workflows
Escalate within defined rules

Human in the Loop

You approve everything that matters

Financial transactions above $500, bulk communications, and anomaly-detected actions all require human approval. Emergency kill switches are always within reach.

Anomaly Detection

$500 Threshold

Kill Switch

Approval Queue

3 pending

Launch email campaign

$2,500 ad spend

Process refund

$847.00

Export lead list

1,240 contacts

Approved

The Seven

Digital employees that build reputation

Seven specialized agents organized into three departments. Each with specific capabilities, strict isolation scopes, and credential-based trust.

Central coordination and workflow management

Configuration

Build your digital organization

Select the departments you need. All configurations include the Secretary orchestrator. Pricing is custom based on your tech stack complexity.

FAQ

Common questions

Each agent runs in a sandboxed container with strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). They physically cannot execute commands outside their scope—it's not just policy, it's architecture. Database agents have read-only access, communication agents can only draft (not send), and all high-impact actions require human approval.
